title: pithecellobium glomeratum
intro: Pithecellobium glomeratum, also known as the "clammy bean tree", is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pithecellobium glomeratum include treating various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as being used as a natural remedy for wounds and skin conditions. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine and natural health remedies.
